alkylation reagent: alkylated for 30 min with 10 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 30 min with 10 mM iodoacetamide
enrichment method: capturing biotinylated glycopeptides using streptavidin affinity matrix
fragmentation method: followed by high-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)-MS/MS scans
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nanoelectrospray ion source
